title: haastia recurva
intro: Haastia recurva, a flowering plant native to New Zealand, is also known as the coastal Haastia or tree Haastia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Haastia recurva is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
